title: Aathangara Oraththil Lyrics Yaan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Aathangara Oraththil
Singer(s): Gana Bala
Movie: Yaan
Music: Harrish Jeyaraj
Lyrics: Kabilan

Aathangara Oraththil ninnaale
kuyilu kuppan kuruviya pola.
Akkam pakkam yarukkum theriyaama
look-u vitta bucknu mela.

Kaththadikkum dheisayi en manasa
kalutha katti ilukkudhu sela.
Aappthakku paayaa kari pola
aaraayi mulunguraa aala.

Thookkathil srikkuren thannaala
yekkathil thavikkuren ponnaale. (2)
Oru karappaan poochi pola
enna kavuthu pottaale.

Mosamaa kadikkura kannaale
pesave mudiyala ennaale
adi innoru thadava idhayam silirkka
iduppa aattaadha.

Aathangara Oraththil ninnaale
kuyilu kuppan kuruviya pola.
Akkam pakkam yarukkum theriyaama
look-u vitta bucknu mela.

go we gotta shake it
penne maama kitta modhu
nee nadakkura nadai udai ayyo
en manasula yedho thadai.

Naan enna theruvula suthura naayaa
iravum pagalum enna kalladichi
thorathura.
Ongappan kitta adivaanga vaikkura
nallava pola nadichu yemaathura.

Unna pathuruven pathuruven naanum
vandhutten vandhutten penne
oru murai kadhala sollu.

Unna pidichruven pidichiruven naanum
vadhirukken vandhirukken penne
kadhala sollu.

Vaai pesum vaasana kiliye
ne pesum oviya silayeo
andha vennilakulla vadacurry
sutta aaya neethaano.

Nee pona aaradi enakku
nethaane chinchinaa jinukku
adi anjara manikke ginger-u soda
tharava naan unakku.

Naan paartha oruthala neethaney
unnaala tharuthala naanthaaney.
ada neruppula vilundha ration arisi
puluvena aaneney.

Mangaatha raniya paarthaeney
kaimaathaa kadhal ketteney
indha komala valli enna thotta
kulikkave maatteney.

Aathangara Oraththil ninnaale
kuyilu kuppan kuruviya pola.
Akkam pakkam yarukkum theriyaama
look-u vitta bucknu mela.

Kaalaaley aadudhu kolusu
yelelo paduthu manasu
oru irumba paartha gaandhagam
pola ilukkudhu ava vayasu.

Raasathi ennudan variya
yemaathi povadhu sariyaa
enna sowrkkapetta beeda pola
mellura arakoraya.

Annaavi maganena irundheney
unnaala theruvula porandeney
en vaadaga cycilil oru mura
vandha vaanaththil parappeney.

Kannaale kannathil adikkaadhey
kannadi valayalaa sinungaadhey
unna nambiye vandha enna ippa
nambiyaar aakkaadhey.

Aathangara ..
kammangara. ..
Aathangara Oraththil ninnaale
kuyilu kuppan jinjinukku jinukku
Akkam pakkam yarukkum theriyaama
look-u vitta dandanakka danukku.

Kaththadikkum dheisayila en manasa
kalutha katti ilukkudhu sela.
Aappthakku paayaa kari pola
aaraayi mulunguraa aala.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the lead actors in the movie Yaan?

The lead actors are Jiiva and Thulasi Nair.

Who composed the music for the song Aathangara Oraththil?

The music was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

What is the mood of the song?

The song has an energetic and peppy mood.

When was the movie Yaan released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.

Who penned the lyrics for the song?

The lyrics were written by Kabilan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aathangara Oraththil from the movie Yaan, released in 2014, features the lead actors Jiiva and Thulasi Nair. Composed by Harrish Jeyaraj and sung by Gaana Bala, this track is a high-energy number with captivating lyrics by Kabilan. The song's vibrant beats and dynamic rhythm make it a favorite for parties and celebrations. It encapsulates a lively and spirited vibe, resonating with audiences who enjoy peppy and upbeat music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aathangara Oraththil, a vibrant and energetic track from the movie Yaan, showcases the musical brilliance of Harrish Jeyaraj and the unique voice of Gaana Bala. This song, featuring the dynamic performances of Jiiva and Thulasi Nair, is a perfect blend of catchy beats and engaging lyrics by Kabilan. Dive into this peppy number that promises to elevate your spirits and set the dance floor on fire.
stanzaMeanings: Song: Aathangara Oraththil Singer(s): Gana Bala Movie: Yaan Music: Harrish Jeyaraj Lyrics: Kabilan
Standing on the riverbank, the cuckoo chirps like a sparrow. Without anyone noticing, it takes a glance and flies away.
The wind blows strongly, shaking my heart like a tied calf. Like a goat in danger, it chews nervously.
In my sleep, I dream of you, and in my wakefulness, I yearn for you. Like a black beetle, you have captivated me.
Your gaze pierces me deeply, leaving me speechless. Oh, make my heart flutter once more, sway your hips.
Standing on the riverbank, the cuckoo chirps like a sparrow. Without anyone noticing, it takes a glance and flies away.
Go, we gotta shake it, girl. Walk confidently, your stride and attire. Oh, there's something stirring in my heart.
Am I wandering the streets like a stray dog? Day and night, you evade me and lead me astray. Pretending to be good, you deceive me.
I will watch over you, I have arrived, girl. Confess your love to me once.
I will hold onto you, I have come, girl. Tell me about your love.
Oh, parrot that speaks sweetly, oh statue that speaks beautifully. Are you the one who roasted the northern curry under the moonlight?
Wherever you go, I follow. You are my shining star. I will offer you ginger soda.
You are the one I saw, and because of you, I am restless. I have become like rice grains fallen into fire.
I saw the queen of cards and asked for love. This delicate vine that touched me, I refuse to bathe.
Standing on the riverbank, the cuckoo chirps like a sparrow. Without anyone noticing, it takes a glance and flies away.
The anklets dance on her feet, and my heart feels heavy like iron. Her youth stirs me like phosphorus.
Oh beloved, is it right to deceive me and leave? Like a heavenly betel leaf, you softly chew and disappear.
I was a nobleman's son, but because of you, I ended up on the streets. On my rented bicycle, I once soared into the sky.
Do not hit my cheeks with your eyes, do not make the bangles jingle. I trusted you and came; do not make me regret it.
Aathangara .. kammangara. .. Standing on the riverbank, the cuckoo chirps like a sparrow. Without anyone noticing, it takes a glance and flies away.
The wind blows strongly, shaking my heart like a tied calf. Like a goat in danger, it chews nervously.
